input_context.instructions:
Task 2.7: Extend Terminal Detector for macOS auto-registration.

YOU MUST USE file_write() TOOL CALLS. Format:
file_write("path/to/file", """complete file content""")

Modify these files:
1. internal/terminal/detector.go - Add auto-registration of adapters
   - Import macos and tmux packages
   - Modify NewDetector() to auto-register adapters
   - Add RequestAccessibilityPermission() method
   - Add GetAdapterStatus() method and AdapterStatus struct
   - Add isMacOSAdapterAvailable() helper

2. internal/terminal/detector_test.go - Add tests for auto-registration

Read spec at docs/tasks/2.7-spec.md for details.

Key requirements:
- Auto-register tmux adapter on all platforms
- Auto-register macOS adapter when on macOS with accessibility
- Graceful handling on non-macOS platforms
